final_message:
Findings written to `findings.md`. Summary of the 6 defects introduced by this diff:

| Location | Defect |
|---|---|
| `src/sync.py:14` | Floor division in page loop drops the last partial page (and all rows when `total_count < 100`) |
| `src/sync.py:24` | Mutable default `seen=[]` persists across calls — users synced once are skipped forever |
| `src/sync.py:35` | Parameterized UPDATE replaced with f-string → SQL injection / breaks on quoted emails |
| `src/sync.py:39` | `log.exception` → bare `pass` silently swallows all sync failures |
| `src/report.py:7` | Early return leaks the opened file handle |
| `src/report.py:11` | `.lower()` on nullable `email` (per `db.py` schema notes) crashes on `None`; `[1]` crashes on missing `@` |
